arts.sum: Under sporting advisor Luis Campos, Paris Saint-Germain has strengthened its connection to Portugal, bringing in promising young talents like Vitinha, João Neves, and Gonçalo Ramos. Now, it appears the club has its sights set on another rising star. arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany doesn’t buy criticism that Bayern Munich needs statement win over PSG in Champions League
arts.sum: Hopefully our fans can go home tomorrow with a good feeling,” said Kompany. As a team, they are really very good,” Kompany said.

arts.ttl: Kompany gives fresh injury update on Pavlovic ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Speaking at a press conference ahead of Bayern Munich's clash with Paris Saint-Germain, Vincent Kompany provided an injury update on Aleksandar Pavlovic.

arts.ttl: ‘Scary’ – Brest boss explains why he did not watch Barcelona’s games vs Bayern & Real Madrid
arts.sum: Stade Brestois head coach Éric Roy has on Monday provided an insight into why he opted against watching back La Liga leaders Barcelona’s performances against Bayern Munich and Real Madrid.…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. PSG: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern has flexed a different version of domination in each victory but this fresh confidence will be severely tested in the next three matches, starting with Tuesday’s Champions League clash against PSG. PSG is six points clear of second-place Monaco in France’s Ligue One, but that success has failed to translate to the Champions League this season.

arts.ttl: Jan-Christian Dreesen hopeful Bayern Munich will agree on an extension with Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: By all accounts, Bayern Munich is ready and willing to make Jamal Musiala one of the club’s highest earners alongside Harry Kane with what reports are suggesting the club is ready to offer him for the proposed contract extension. While talks between the club and Musiala over the new deal have been positive thus far, Dreesen did not want to put any sort of specific timetable on getting the deal over the line to create any unnecessary pressure on anyone externally or internally.
